titulo: Yesterday (Live With Spoken Word Intro, New York) [Remastered 2015]

timestamps.text: Yesterday, all my troubles seemed so far away
timestamps.translation: Ontem, todos os meus problemas pareciam tão distantes

timestamps.text: Now it looks as though they're here to stay
timestamps.translation: Agora parece que eles vieram para ficar

timestamps.text: Oh, I believe in yesterday
timestamps.translation: Oh, eu acredito no ontem

timestamps.text: Suddenly, I'm not half the man I used to be
timestamps.translation: De repente, não sou nem metade do homem que eu costumava ser

timestamps.text: There's a shadow hanging over me
timestamps.translation: Há uma sombra pairando sobre mim

timestamps.text: Oh, yesterday came suddenly
timestamps.translation: Oh, o ontem veio de repente

timestamps.text: Why she had to go?
timestamps.translation: Por que ela teve que ir?

timestamps.text: I don't know, she wouldn't say
timestamps.translation: Eu não sei, ela não quis dizer

timestamps.text: I said something wrong
timestamps.translation: Eu disse algo errado

timestamps.text: Now I long for yesterday
timestamps.translation: Agora eu sinto saudades do ontem

timestamps.text: Yesterday, love was such an easy game to play
timestamps.translation: Ontem, o amor era um jogo tão fácil de jogar

timestamps.text: Now I need a place to hide away
timestamps.translation: Agora preciso de um lugar para me esconder

timestamps.text: Oh, I believe in yesterday
timestamps.translation: Oh, eu acredito no ontem

timestamps.text: Why she had to go?
timestamps.translation: Por que ela teve que ir?

timestamps.text: I don't know, she wouldn't say

timestamps.text: Now I long for yesterday

timestamps.translation: Oh, eu acredito no ontem

timestamps.text: Mm mm mm mm mm mm mm
timestamps.translation: Mm mm mm mm mm mm mm
